case_title: ENRIQUEZ, MARIA LIZA VS SHAPIRO, YAKOV (OWNER OF CAR) et al

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL OF PLTF'S CLAIM SENT TO YAKOV SHAPIRO RETURNED--UNCLAIMED
